merged_prs.title: feat: add dark mode toggle
merged_prs.author: alice
merged_prs.description: Adds a dark mode toggle to the web UI that automatically respects the OS-level system preference and allows manual override.

merged_prs.title: refactor: clean up batch job runner
merged_prs.author: dave
merged_prs.description: Internal refactor of the batch job runner — no user-visible change but reduces future maintenance burden.

merged_prs.title: fix: iOS layout breakage on dark-mode CSS
merged_prs.author: alice
merged_prs.description: Fixes the mobile layout regression on iOS Safari introduced by the dark-mode CSS changes in PR #101.

merged_prs.title: fix: resolve race condition in rate-limiter
merged_prs.author: bob
merged_prs.description: Resolves a race condition in the API rate-limiter that caused intermittent 429 errors under concurrent load.

merged_prs.title: feat: batch inference support for retro clustering
merged_prs.author: carol
merged_prs.description: The embedding pipeline now supports batch inference, enabling retrospective clustering to process sprint data in a single pass.

merged_prs.title: ci: stabilise flaky unit-test suite on api-service
merged_prs.author: bob
merged_prs.description: Root cause of the flaky unit tests identified (shared state in test fixtures) and fixed. CI reliability improved by ~40%.

closed_tickets.summary: Dark mode toggle for web UI
Implement embedding pipeline with batch inference
Fix rate-limiter race condition under concurrent load

carried_over_tickets.summary: Security: rotate API keys after token leak
carried_over_tickets.reason: Added mid-sprint Day 2; insufficient capacity to complete.

merged_prs.title: security: rotate API keys and revoke exposed credentials
merged_prs.author: bob
merged_prs.description: Rotates all API keys exposed in the July security incident and adds automated secret-scanning enforcement to CI.

merged_prs.title: fix: root cause of flaky CI test suite
merged_prs.author: bob
merged_prs.description: Eliminates shared mutable state in test fixtures that caused intermittent failures, reducing CI false-positive rate to zero.

merged_prs.title: feat: merge SLA automation — Slack reminder bot
merged_prs.author: alice
merged_prs.description: Automatically posts a Slack reminder when an approved PR has not been merged within 48 hours, reducing stale-PR accumulation.

merged_prs.title: feat: PTO-aware sprint capacity calculator
merged_prs.author: eve
merged_prs.description: Sprint planning now pulls PTO data from the company calendar and automatically reduces capacity to prevent over-commitment.

merged_prs.title: docs: add onboarding checklist and repo access guide
merged_prs.author: frank
merged_prs.description: New onboarding checklist and repo-access guide published to the internal wiki; reduces new-joiner setup time from 2 days to under 2 hours.

closed_tickets.summary: Auth-service repo access and onboarding doc
